_comment: Print-on-demand product config. One entry per deck. The print page reads this to show a 'Buy a printed deck' button. To go live: create the product at your vendor, paste its public product/checkout URL into product_url (add any affiliate tag there), and set status to 'live'. back_image is optional — when set, the print page offers a deck-back option.

default_vendor.name: The Game Crafter
default_vendor.note: You are the seller; you earn margin per sale (better than a typical affiliate cut). Affiliate-tagged URLs also work — just paste them into product_url.

tarot-de-marseille-conver.note: All 78 print-ready; 24 have bleed margin, print the rest as bordered cards.

etteilla-i-livre-de-thot.note: All 78 print-ready; print as bordered cards (no bleed margin).

etteilla-iii-oracle-des-dames.note: All 78 print-ready; 22 have bleed, print the rest as bordered cards.
